mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEDIA_ITEMS ( media_id, user_id, album_id, media_type, title, uploaded_at, taken_at, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{mediaId}, #{userId}, #{albumId}, #{mediaType}, #{title}, #{uploadedAt}, #{takenAt}, 'N' )

INSERT INTO MEDIA_VARIANT ( variant_id, media_id, variant_type, storage_key, file_org_name, file_save_name, extension, mime_type, file_size, width, height, duration_sec, created_at ) VALUES ( #{variantId}, #{mediaId}, #{variantType}, #{storageKey}, #{fileOrgName}, #{fileSaveName}, #{extension}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{width}, #{height}, #{durationSec}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id, user_id, tag_name, normalized_name, tag_scope FROM TAG WHERE normalized_name = #{normalizedName} AND del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1
SELECT tag_id, user_id, tag_name, normalized_name, tag_scope FROM TAG WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY CASE WHEN tag_scope = 'P' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, tag_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAG ( tag_id, user_id, tag_name, normalized_name, created_at, tag_scope, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{tagId}, #{userId}, #{tagName}, #{normalizedName}, NOW(), 'N', 'N' )
INSERT INTO MEDIA_TAG ( md_id, media_id, tag_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{mdId}, #{mediaId}, #{tagId}, NOW() )
